applied_changes.reason: Maintain maximum conductivity as it is already at the upper bound; this is the primary lever for lateral spreading.
Increase spreader height by 20% (within 1.5x limit) to provide more vertical thermal mass and conduction path above the chip without exceeding domain bounds.
Increase spreader width by 20% to extend lateral heat spreading area towards the cold boundaries, staying well within the [0.2, 1.0] domain limit.
